title: First-time onboarding
goal: Create a workspace, project, and teammate invitation.

tooltip.title: Create your workspace
tooltip.body: Workspaces keep projects, teammates, and settings in one shared home.

tooltip.title: Name your workspace
tooltip.body: Add a demo-safe workspace name, then continue to project setup.

tooltip.title: Create the first project
tooltip.body: Add a demo-safe project name, then create the project.

tooltip.title: Invite a teammate
tooltip.body: Enter a demo-safe email address, then send the invitation.
